text:
Claude Sonnet 5 is here.

Top-tier performance on coding and tool use at Sonnet pricing, with a 1M context window.

It's the new default in Claude Code for Pro users, and available everywhere on the Claude Platform, including the API and Managed Agents. https://t.co/LuOPth6rsd
